_comment: One chosen line per location (Overheard hint). Best-effort from DPPt game text; wording needs QA against a text dump before we claim exact quotation — every line is verified:false until checked (see CURATION_TODO.md). `who` is deliberately simple/unrevealing (Paul, 2026-07-20); `sprite` is a public/content-relative path to the speaker's sprite (null = text only).

twinleaf-town.text: If you're late, I'm fining you $10 million!

sandgem-town.text: This world is inhabited by creatures known as Pokémon.

jubilife-city.text: This is the most modern city in all of Sinnoh!

oreburgh-city.text: This is an energetic mining town. Almost everyone works in the coal mine.

floaroma-town.text: Isn't it lovely here? The whole town smells sweet like flowers and honey.

eterna-city.text: That statue depicts an ancient Pokémon said to have shaped this land.

hearthome-city.text: Ohohoho! You have come to challenge moi?

solaceon-town.text: Leave your Pokémon with us, and we'll raise it with care!

veilstone-city.text: I've been training here forever… but I still don't know what it means to be truly strong.

celestic-town.text: Our little town has guarded the old stories of Sinnoh for generations.

canalave-city.text: My boat sails for Iron Island. Hop aboard whenever you like!

snowpoint-city.text: I'm tough because I know how to focus!

sunyshore-city.text: He shut himself in the lighthouse… Our Gym Leader is bored of battling.

sinnoh-pokemon-league.text: Only Trainers who have defeated all eight Gyms may enter here.

fight-area.text: Strong Trainers from every region gather on this island!

survival-area.text: This is a town for real survivalists! The mountain is no joke.

resort-area.text: Ahhh, this is the place where adults come to play.

lake-verity.text: They say a Pokémon of emotion sleeps at the bottom of this lake.

oreburgh-gate.text: Take this! It's Rock Smash! Smash those cracked boulders right out of your way!

valley-windworks.text: This facility is now under the control of Team Galactic!

eterna-forest.text: Um… may I go through the forest with you? It's a little scary alone.

wayward-cave.text: Mira is lost… Can you take Mira to the exit?

mt-coronet.text: This mountain divides Sinnoh in two. They say the region began here.

maniac-tunnel.text: I'm digging my way to the ruins! Don't rush me — archaeology takes time!

pal-park.text: Welcome! Pokémon that migrated from faraway regions live in this preserve.

iron-island.text: The mine here is abandoned… but it's perfect for training. Shall we team up?

lake-valor.text: The lake… they drained the whole lake! Those Galactic monsters!

lake-acuity.text: Hmph. You're just not strong enough to protect anything.

fuego-ironworks.text: We forge parts for Poké Balls here! The floor tiles move — watch your step!

spear-pillar.text: Time and space will bend to me. Here, I will create my new world.

turnback-cave.text: No matter how far you walk… you end up back where you began.

sinnoh-victory-road.text: This is the final test. If your team can't cut it, turn back now!

fullmoon-island.text: On nights of the full moon, a Pokémon here shares pleasant dreams.

newmoon-island.text: A nightmare that never ends… that is the gift of the one who lives here.

stark-mountain.text: I'm taking the Magma Stone home as a souvenir! …What? The volcano's rumbling?

flower-paradise.text: Flowers as far as the eye can see… They say a gratitude Pokémon plays here.

sinnoh-route-201.text: Wait! Don't go into the tall grass! Wild Pokémon will attack you!

sinnoh-route-202.text: Here, let me show you how to catch a Pokémon!

sinnoh-route-203.text: You know what? Shorts are comfy and easy to wear!

sinnoh-route-204.text: The path ahead was ravaged by rockslides. You'll need to smash through!

sinnoh-route-205.text: Have you seen my papa? He works at the windworks, but the door is locked…

sinnoh-route-206.text: This is Cycling Road! No bike, no entry — them's the rules!

sinnoh-route-207.text: This slope's too steep to climb on foot. You'd need a bicycle!

sinnoh-route-208.text: The Berry Master lives just west of here. He'll share Berries every day!

sinnoh-route-209.text: The tower here is where departed Pokémon are laid to rest.

sinnoh-route-210.text: Moo! I mean — welcome to Café Cabin! Our Moomoo Milk is fresh!

sinnoh-route-211.text: The wind howls through here from Mt. Coronet. Hold onto your hat!

sinnoh-route-212.text: The mansion's Trophy Garden is famous — rare Pokémon appear there!

sinnoh-route-213.text: Hold still! Let me read your Pokémon's footprints… fascinating!

sinnoh-route-214.text: I sell rare bones from the ruins. Interested in some… archaeology?

sinnoh-route-215.text: It never stops raining on this road. My Pokémon love it, though!

sinnoh-route-216.text: The snow never lets up here. There's a lodge ahead — go warm up!

sinnoh-route-217.text: This blizzard? This is nothing to the folks of Snowpoint!

sinnoh-route-218.text: The fish Pokémon here bite better than anywhere on the coast!

sinnoh-route-219.text: The sea south of here goes on and on… all the way to Pal Park!

sinnoh-sea-route-220.text: Swimming across? Watch for Trainers — they'll battle you mid-stroke!

sinnoh-route-221.text: That old man at the shrine gives a prize if your Pokémon's level ends in 1!

sinnoh-route-222.text: The beach here sparkles! Sunyshore is just up the road!

sinnoh-sea-route-223.text: Beyond these waves is the Pokémon League. Almost there, Trainer!

sinnoh-route-224.text: That white rock… I've never seen anything like it. Want to write a message?

sinnoh-route-225.text: The Battle Zone's paths are rough and wild — just how I like it!

sinnoh-sea-route-226.text: The currents here are fierce! Only strong swimmers make the crossing.

sinnoh-route-227.text: That volcano ahead? Stark Mountain. Even the ground here is warm.

sinnoh-route-228.text: This sandstorm never quits! It's the best training weather there is!

sinnoh-route-229.text: Trainers gather in this meadow to battle all day, every day.

sinnoh-sea-route-230.text: Just a little farther and you're back at the Resort Area. What a swim!
